center.name: Kawhia Harbour
center.summary: Kawhia Harbour是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黑長腳鷸，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Most black stilts will also overwinter in the Mackenzie Basin, but about 10% of the population, especially hybrids and those paired with pied stilts, migrate to North Island harbours such as Kawhia and Kaipara in January for the winter
